title: Homeland Security Research Division
description: The Homeland Security Research Division is the research unit within RAND that houses the Homeland Security Operational Analysis Center, an FFRDC operated by RAND under contract with the Department of Homeland Security.
text:
If people lack housing…they end up in unsafe conditions or move away. And if people stay away too long, they may not return. One of the goals of disaster recovery is to return a community to its normal functioning, along with its schools, hospitals, businesses, and essential services.
Patrick S. Roberts
Senior Political Scientist, RAND
Source: The Washington Post
I don't think AI poses an irreversible harm to humanity. I think it can worsen our lives. I think it can have long-lasting harm. But I think it's ultimately something that we can recover from.
Jonathan W. Welburn
Senior Researcher, RAND
Source: rand.org
